Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11899 0 0}Umiushi Bowl... Truly a one-of-a-kind delicacy! So very oishii![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 1 -1 -1 0 0}The meat goes so well with the rice! A combination that brings out both flavors![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11875 0 0}Speaking of rice... What is your favorite dish with it, {f 4 2}-dono?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11888 0 0}Honto!? Really!? What a shame. How can you be Japanese and not eat rice?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like we didn't get any closer today...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11895 0 0}{f 5 13 15 30 112}Ah yes! Green tea over rice, ochazuke! A Japanese staple![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like we became a lot closer today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 0 -1 -1 0 0}But I think ochazuke is the best. A simple dish, just green tea over rice, but a Japanese staple![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I learned a little more about him today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11900 0 0}Of course, I plan to have rice for dinner as well! Nothing beats ochazuke![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 0 -1 -1 0 0}But first, I must buy some tea. Will you accompany me?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}After shopping with Bebe,[n]I returned to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
